calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-10-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Deborah Neville.
Arnold Evje, Esq., for Plaintiff Sit Poy Wong.
Defendant, Jerome L. Reid present in pro per.
Parties reached a settlement by stipulation, signed by the parties, but not read into the record.
Case settled, trial date is vacated.
